case_title: JEAN CLAUDE LAIR VS. SOFIYA BORISOVNA KOGAN

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-04-2016 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LAIR, JEAN CLAUDE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KOGAN, SOFIYA BORISOVNA $1,200.00 PRINCIPAL, $125.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,325.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (FEE FOR SERVICE:$NOT GIVEN) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LAIR, JEAN CLAUDE AS TO DEFENDANT KOGAN, SOFIYA BORISOVNA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$50.00) SERVED JAN-10-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT KOGAN, SOFIYA BORISOVNA
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY LAIR, JEAN CLAUDE AS TO DEFENDANT KOGAN, SOFIYA BORISOVNA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-04-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-04-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-04-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT KOGAN, SOFIYA BORISOVNA
